parameters.content:
## 🖼️ F04 — POP + POD (Proof of Pickup + Delivery)
**POST** `/webhook/lalamove-pod`  
Chamado automaticamente pelo F03 em ORDER_DELIVERED/ORDER_COMPLETED

**Fluxo:** spa_id + orderId → GET /v3/orders → extrai POP (coleta) + POD (entrega) → atualiza B24 (flags + stage WON) + adiciona comment de timeline com as fotos

> `stops[0].POP.imageUrls[]` = fotos coleta | `stops[-1].POD.image` = foto entrega

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ ok: true, orderId: $('📊 Parse POP+POD').first().json.orderId, pop_images: $('📊 Parse POP+POD').first().json.popImages.length, pod_image: $('📊 Parse POP+POD').first().json.hasPOD }) }}
